description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features a smooth, curved surface made from interlocking wooden panels, with metal guardrails running along the top edges for safety. One side of the ramp includes a staircase with a platform, allowing users to access the top of the ramp easily. The ramp is elevated off the ground with sturdy wooden supports and has a central cutout or opening beneath the main skating surface. Graffiti art is visible on the exterior, adding to its urban aesthetic. The overall design is robust and built to accommodate multiple users engaging in skateboarding, BMX, or similar activities.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails, a staircase, and graffiti details, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the half-pipe, the central opening beneath, and graffiti on the exterior wall.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curved skating surface, the staircase, and the elevated platform on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the length of the ramp, the central cutout, and the side profile of the staircase and platform.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view focusing on the curved interior of the ramp and the staircase structure on the right.
